The '''Markul''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Alien/Legends|aliens]]. In [[Melvosh Bloor]]'s opinion, they did not resemble [[Kowakian monkey-lizard/Legends|Kowakian monkey-lizards]].

[[Darian Gli]] was a Markul.

{{Species-stub}}
